title: MMO Tab Targeting and Third Person Camera Mod
description: Adds fully configurable mmo style tab targeting and third person camera with first person target tracking support and advanced target aiming adjustments for accuracy and precision.
body: This mod adds an enhanced third person and first person targeting experience that allows for MMO style tab targeting, target direction indicators, enhanced third person targeting accuracy and precision, and a more cinematic combat experience for your Minecraft gameplay. The mod also has full in game configurable keybinds, crosshairs, and GUI elements. It uses the Fabric Modloader and requires the Fabric API to function but other than that can be used on any client and any server that runs an appropriate version of Minecraft (1.21.1+). If you have any issues with versions other than 1.21.1 reach out to us via Discord and let us know. This mod was designed with 1.21.1 in mind but we are currently working on expanding its usability both forward and backward in compatibility.
